title: Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas acts on NHIT ₹3,086 crore fundraise
description: National Highways Infra Trust, a privately listed infrastructure investment trust, sponsored by National Highways Authority of India (NHAI), has raised ₹3,086.01 crore from it's fifth round of fund raising by way of institutional placement of units to eligible investors, for an amount aggregating to ₹2,468.808 crore and on a preferential basis for an amount aggregating to ₹617.202 crore.Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas advised lead managers SBI Capital Markets Limited, Axis Capital Limited, I
